item.berries.name: Berries
item.toxic_berries.name: Toxic Berries
item.toxic_berries.desc: Harvested from a toxic plant — poisonous to eat. Scan flora first.
item.emergency_ration.name: Emergency Ration
item.emergency_ration.desc: Suit ration — auto-eaten when you're about to starve.
item.suit_teleporter.name: Suit Teleporter
item.suit_teleporter.desc: Recalls you to your ship. Recharges between uses.
blueprint.suit_teleporter.name: Suit Teleporter
blueprint.suit_teleporter.desc: Craft a suit teleporter to recall to your ship.
item.oxygen_extractor.name: Oxygen Extractor
item.oxygen_extractor.desc: Pulls oxygen from a toxic atmosphere, slowing suit oxygen loss.
blueprint.oxygen_extractor.name: Oxygen Extractor
blueprint.oxygen_extractor.desc: Craft a suit oxygen extractor for toxic atmospheres.
item.stealth_suit.name: Stealth Suit
item.stealth_suit.desc: Cloaks you from creatures; drains suit energy while active.
item.advanced_scanner.name: Advanced Scanner
item.advanced_scanner.desc: A better scanner — earns more knowledge per discovery.
item.mining_beam.name: Mining Beam
item.mining_beam.desc: A high-tier mining tool for the toughest blocks.
item.armor_chest.name: Armor Plating
item.armor_legs.name: Leg Armor
item.helmet.name: Helmet
item.helmet.desc: A reinforced helmet — reduces physical damage.
item.oxygen_tank_2.name: Large Oxygen Tank
item.suit_lamp.name: Suit Lamp
item.suit_lamp.desc: A brighter helmet lamp for dark places.
item.jetpack.name: Jetpack
item.jetpack.desc: Hold Jump in the air to thrust upward; drains suit energy. Recharges aboard ship and at the heal-tank.
item.radar_scanner.name: Radar Scanner
item.radar_scanner.desc: Adds nearby contacts to the HUD radar.

item.comm_radio.desc: A communications radio — lets you chat with other players.

blueprint.comm_radio.desc: Craft a comm radio to talk to other players.

creature.generic.name: Creature
item.machete.name: Machete
item.machete.desc: A heavy blade for close combat.
item.vibro_knife.name: Vibro-Knife
item.vibro_knife.desc: A humming blade that cuts deeper.
item.plasma_sword.name: Plasma Sword
item.plasma_sword.desc: A searing plasma blade — devastating in melee.
item.gauss_pistol.name: Gauss Pistol
item.laser_pistol.name: Laser Pistol
item.laser_pistol.desc: A ranged energy sidearm; draws suit energy.
item.plasma_blaster.name: Plasma Blaster
item.plasma_blaster.desc: Heavy ranged plasma weapon; high energy draw.

item.energy_cell_1.name: Energy Cell I
item.titanium_plate.name: Titanium Plate
item.data_fragment.name: Data Fragment
item.oxygen_tank_1.name: Oxygen Tank I
item.medpack.name: Medpack
item.glass.name: Glass Block
item.iron_wall.name: Iron Wall
item.basic_drill.name: Basic Drill
item.basic_drill.desc: A simple drill for soft and common blocks.
item.titanium_drill.name: Titanium Drill
item.titanium_drill.desc: Mines harder ores such as titanium.
item.block_placer.name: Block Placer
item.hand_scanner.name: Hand Scanner
item.field_medkit.name: Field Medkit
item.field_medkit.desc: A reusable medkit — right-click to heal yourself and nearby teammates. Costs suit energy.
item.stasis_projector.name: Stasis Projector
item.stasis_projector.desc: Right-click to freeze nearby creatures in stasis for a few seconds — long enough to scan them safely. Costs suit energy.
item.terrain_blaster.name: Terrain Blaster
item.terrain_blaster.desc: Right-click to blast a sphere of terrain to rubble — fast clearing, but it yields no materials. Costs suit energy.
item.terrain_scanner.name: Terrain Scanner
item.terrain_scanner.desc: Right-click to emit a scan pulse: valuable ores around you glow through the terrain for a few seconds — including underground. Costs suit energy.
item.creature_translator.name: Creature Translator
item.creature_translator.desc: Right-click a wild creature to read its mood and what it wants. Respond the right way — bait, calm, approach or give space — to earn its trust and tame it. Costs suit energy.
item.forage_bait.name: Forage Bait
item.forage_bait.desc: A bundle of plant matter that herbivorous creatures love. Used while taming.
item.meat_bait.name: Meat Bait
item.meat_bait.desc: A strip of fresh meat that lures carnivorous creatures. Used while taming.
item.nectar_lure.name: Nectar Lure
item.nectar_lure.desc: A sweet, salty lure that tempts gentle grazers. Used while taming.
blueprint.oxygen_tank_1.name: Oxygen Tank I
blueprint.oxygen_tank_1.desc: Unlocks crafting of the first oxygen tank upgrade.
blueprint.titanium_drill.name: Titanium Drill
blueprint.titanium_drill.desc: Unlocks crafting of the titanium drill.
blueprint.field_medkit.name: Field Medkit
blueprint.field_medkit.desc: Unlocks the field medkit: a reusable area heal for you and nearby allies.
blueprint.stasis_projector.name: Stasis Projector
blueprint.stasis_projector.desc: Unlocks the stasis projector: briefly freezes creatures so you can scan them without being attacked.
blueprint.terrain_blaster.name: Terrain Blaster
blueprint.terrain_blaster.desc: Unlocks the terrain blaster: clears a large sphere of terrain at once (no drops).
blueprint.terrain_scanner.name: Terrain Scanner
blueprint.terrain_scanner.desc: Unlocks the terrain scanner: a pulse that reveals valuable ores around you, even underground.
blueprint.creature_translator.name: Creature Translator
blueprint.creature_translator.desc: Unlocks the creature translator: decode a creature's mood so you can win its trust and tame it as a companion.
creature.tame.need.feed: It's hungry — offer the bait it craves.
creature.tame.need.space: It's nervous — give it some space.
creature.tame.msg.start: You begin to win its trust…
creature.tame.msg.spooked: You spooked it — it bolted away!
creature.tame.msg.provoked: Wrong move — it turned on you!
creature.tame.msg.nobait: You don't have the bait it wants.
creature.tame.msg.success: It trusts you now — a new companion!
creature.tame.msg.full: You already have too many companions on this world.
creature.tame.msg.gone: The creature is no longer close enough.
ui.tame.title: Taming
ui.companions.title: Companions
ui.companions.empty: No companions yet. Tame a creature with the Creature Translator.
blueprint.radio_beacon.name: Radio Beacon
blueprint.radio_beacon.desc: Unlocks the radio beacon: a placeable marker that shows up on the map and compass with your own label.
blueprint.beam_block.name: Beam Block
blueprint.beam_block.desc: Unlocks the beam block: a craftable, named teleporter pad. Beam between your own and allied beam blocks on the same world.
blueprint.cargo_expansion_1.name: Cargo Expansion I
blueprint.cargo_expansion_1.desc: Unlocks the first cargo hold expansion.
blueprint.refinery.name: Refinery
blueprint.refinery.desc: Unlocks the refinery module for processing ores.
blueprint.detoxifier.name: Detoxifier
blueprint.detoxifier.desc: Unlocks the detoxifier module that turns poison into safe food.
blueprint.tractor_beam.name: Tractor Beam
blueprint.tractor_beam.desc: Unlocks the tractor beam that pulls salvage drops into the cargo hold.
blueprint.oxygen_generator.name: Oxygen Generator
blueprint.docking_module.name: Docking Module
blueprint.docking_module.desc: Unlocks an airlock/docking module so ships can dock.
blueprint.jump_generator.name: Jump Generator
blueprint.jump_generator.desc: Unlocks a hyperspace jump generator so your ship can travel between star systems.
blueprint.radar_array.name: Radar Array
blueprint.radar_array.desc: Unlocks a long-range radar array that widens the ship's space radar.
blueprint.hull_plating.name: Hull Plating
blueprint.hull_plating.desc: Unlocks reinforced hull plating that raises the ship's hull integrity.
blueprint.shield_generator.name: Shield Generator
blueprint.shield_generator.desc: Unlocks a regenerating energy shield for the ship.
blueprint.asteroid_breaker.name: Asteroid Breaker
blueprint.asteroid_breaker.desc: Unlocks a mining beam that breaks asteroids in space (a tool, not a combat weapon).
blueprint.ship_cannon_1.name: Ship Cannon I
blueprint.ship_cannon_1.desc: Unlocks a basic energy cannon for the ship (works only where the server allows ship weapons).
blueprint.laser_cannon_2.name: Laser Cannon II
blueprint.laser_cannon_2.desc: Unlocks a stronger laser cannon for the ship (works only where the server allows ship weapons).
blueprint.ship_hauler.name: Hauler Ship
blueprint.ship_hauler.desc: Unlocks crafting the Hauler — a bigger ship with a large cargo hold.
blueprint.ship_scout.name: Scout Ship
blueprint.ship_scout.desc: Unlocks crafting the Scout — a small, shielded ship.
blueprint.ship_corvette.name: Corvette
blueprint.ship_corvette.desc: Unlocks crafting the Corvette — a balanced mid-class ship.
ship.starter.name: Starter Ship
ship.starter.desc: Your first ship — workshop, medbay, quarters and a basic cargo hold.
ship.hauler.name: Hauler
ship.hauler.desc: A large freighter with reinforced hull and a big cargo hold.
ship.scout.name: Scout
ship.scout.desc: A small, shielded ship for quick trips.
ship.corvette.name: Corvette
ship.corvette.desc: A balanced mid-class ship — solid hull, shield, speed and cargo.
module.cockpit.name: Cockpit
module.cockpit.desc: Access the star map, travel and scanning.
module.reactor.name: Reactor
module.life_support.name: Life Support
module.quarters.name: Crew Quarters
module.quarters.desc: Sleep to skip time and set a respawn point.
module.medbay.name: Medbay
module.workshop.name: Workshop
module.workshop.desc: Craft tools, parts and basic modules.
module.cargo_hold_basic.name: Cargo Hold
module.cargo_hold_1.name: Cargo Hold Expansion I
module.cargo_hold_1.desc: Adds visible storage to the ship.
module.refinery.name: Refinery
module.detoxifier.name: Detoxifier
module.detoxifier.desc: Processes poisonous plants and meat into safe food.
module.tractor_beam.name: Tractor Beam
module.tractor_beam.desc: Pulls nearby salvage drops in space into the cargo hold.
module.oxygen_generator.name: Oxygen Generator
module.docking_module.name: Docking Module
module.docking_module.desc: An airlock that lets ships dock and players cross over.
module.jump_generator.name: Jump Generator
module.jump_generator.desc: A hyperspace drive that lets the ship jump to other star systems from the star map.
module.radar_array.name: Radar Array
module.radar_array.desc: A long-range radar dish that widens the space radar so you spot ships and stations sooner.
module.hull_plating.name: Hull Plating
module.hull_plating.desc: Reinforced plating that increases the ship's hull integrity.
module.shield_generator.name: Shield Generator
module.shield_generator.desc: Projects an energy shield that absorbs damage and recharges out of combat.
module.asteroid_breaker.name: Asteroid Breaker
module.asteroid_breaker.desc: A mining beam that breaks asteroids in free space and frees their resources.
module.ship_laser_basic.name: Laser Cannon
module.ship_laser_basic.desc: A basic dual-purpose ship laser: mine asteroids for resources AND fight off hostiles. Fitted on every starter ship.
module.ship_cannon_1.name: Ship Cannon I
module.ship_cannon_1.desc: A basic energy cannon. Effective against small asteroids and weak drones.
module.laser_cannon_2.name: Laser Cannon II
module.laser_cannon_2.desc: A stronger laser turret for tougher NPC fighters.
mission.settlement.gather.title: Settlement Supply Request
mission.settlement.gather.desc: Deliver the requested resources to the settlement's mission board for a reward.
ui.hud.hint: WASD move · LMB mine · RMB place · 1-9 hotbar · F attack · G loot · R repair · L lamp · M map · Enter chat · E use · V view · Tab menu · Esc quit
ui.shipmenu.title: SHIP INTERFACE
ui.story.off: No story is active in this world.
ui.story.none: Nothing yet — explore, recover fragments, and fight the machines.
ui.finale.hack_hint: Reach the Guardian core below — dig down or take the shaft — then hold [F] to breach it
ui.finale.resolved: The Guardian core powers down. Across every world, the machines stand down.
ui.alliance.title: Alliances
ui.alliance.about:
Form an alliance with another player to share access. Allies may build, mine and use each other's space stations and planet bases as if they owned them, and cannot harm one another — even on a PVP server. Your ship stays private: only you can board it.

Forming an alliance needs the other player's confirmation. Either side can end it at any time.
ui.alliance.none: No allies yet. Use "Find players" to propose one.
ui.alliance.no_players: No other players online to ally with right now.
ui.funk.title: Radio (Funk)
ui.funk.hint: Broadcasts to every player on the server. A comm radio is required to transmit.
ui.wiki.title: CODEX
ui.arcade.title: DATAQUBES
ui.arcade.empty_body: Find glowing data cubes out on planets and press E to extract their data fragments.
ui.browser.unavailable_body: The embedded browser (UnityWebBrowser) is not present in this build. See docs/MINIGAMES_AND_WIKI.md to enable it.
ui.vendor.title: Trader
ui.vendor.subtitle: Barter — give materials, get materials
ui.map.click_hint: Click the map to set a waypoint.
ui.map.hyperjump_hint: Different system — requires a jump generator.
ui.map.system_unexplored: You've never been to this system — its worlds are unknown until you jump there.
ui.map.pick_destination: Pick a destination on the left.
ui.map.locked_hint: Never landed here — fly there and land manually first (or enable Instant Travel).
npc.greet.vendor: Welcome to my stall, traveler. Care to trade?
npc.greet.quartermaster: Looking for work? Check the board.
ui.missions.create_hint: Post a mission others can complete — you stake the reward.
ui.missions.need_fields: Add a title and at least one objective.
ui.crafting.title: Crafting
ui.color.none: No dyeable materials in your inventory.
ui.color.help: Pick a colour to dye the material, or to craft it into a coloured light source.
ui.shape.none: No shapeable materials in your inventory.
ui.shape.help: Pick a form to re-shape the material; it still works like a block. Ramps and stairs face the way you look when you place them.
ui.craft.pick: Select an entry on the left.
ui.craft.need_market: Trade at a vendor or your ship's trade console.
ui.craft.go_to_workshop: Go to the workshop to craft.
ui.craft.go_to_lab: Go to the lab to research.
ui.inventory.title: Inventory
ui.inventory.quickbar_hint: Pick a quick-slot to put this item on the quick-bar.
ui.cargo.title: Cargo Hold
ui.starmap.title: Star Map
ui.save.title: SELECT WORLD
ui.save.subtitle: Resume a saved world or start a new one to test.
ui.save.none: No saved worlds yet — create one on the right.
ui.save.name: World name
ui.save.delete_confirm: Delete world '{world}'? This cannot be undone.
ui.save.hint: A new name makes a fresh, differently-seeded world. Reusing a name resumes that save. Worlds are saved per name under your profile.
ui.editors.title: EDITORS
ui.editors.subtitle: Design your own ships, look, stations and towns.
ui.editors.info_body: Build content by hand and export it. The Ship Designer makes craftable ship types; the Avatar Designer your character look; the Station and Town editors export templates that can appear in generated worlds (via tools/merge_structure.py). Each editor: hold right-mouse to look, WASD/Q-E to fly, left-click place, middle-click remove.
ui.content.name: Name
ui.content.need_key: Give the item a key first.
ui.content.hint: Define an item + its recipe, then Save. Run tools/merge_recipe.py to fold it into the game data.
ui.material.hint: Paint a tile (left-click paint, right-click erase), set its mining/look/spawn, then Save. Run tools/merge_material.py to fold it into the game.
ui.struct.name: Name
ui.struct.hint: Hold RIGHT-MOUSE to look · WASD + Q/E to fly · Shift = faster · LEFT-CLICK place · MIDDLE-CLICK remove · Esc = menu
ui.avatar.title: AVATAR DESIGNER
ui.avatar.name: Skin name
ui.avatar.applied: Applied — your in-game avatar now uses these colours.
ui.avatar.need_name: Give the skin a name first.
ui.avatar.hint: The preview rotates so you can see all sides. Apply saves the colours; Export writes a skin bundle.
ui.host.title: HOST A WORLD
ui.host.subtitle: Host a world for friends: pick any saved world or create a new one, then share the address shown in-game.
ui.settings.title: Settings
ui.face.title: Face editor
ui.face.hint: Left-click to paint · right-click to erase · E = eraser
ui.settings.update_notinstalled: Only available in the installed version.
ui.settings.update_nourl: No update server set (see the server's web portal).
ui.loading.title: Loading…
ui.info.mp_desc: Play with friends or host your own server.
ui.loading.tip: Upgrade your ship's modules to survive harsher planets.
ui.loading.status: Generating star systems     ·     Preparing planet chunks     ·     Syncing mission data
ui.credits.title: Credits
ui.credits.body:
Blocks Beyond the Stars — JuMaVe Games

A family project:
Justus Dütscher (son) — ideas, game design, playtesting
Marcel Dütscher (father) — technical lead and AI prompting
Verena Dütscher (mother) — game balancing and playtesting

We're hoping for community support! Get involved and join in — your name could soon be here too!
hud.atmosphere.left: You have left the atmosphere — zero gravity

ui.space.eva_board_ship: Press E to board your ship

block.workbench.name: Workbench
item.workbench.name: Workbench
item.workbench.desc: Place it to craft workshop recipes on a world, away from your ship.
block.forge.name: Forge
item.forge.name: Forge
item.forge.desc: Place it to smelt and refine on a world, away from your ship.
block.steel_floor.name: Steel Floor
item.steel_floor.name: Steel Floor
block.metal_panel.name: Metal Panel
item.metal_panel.name: Metal Panel
block.concrete.name: Concrete
item.concrete.name: Concrete
block.crate.name: Storage Crate
item.crate.name: Storage Crate
item.crate.desc: Place it to stash items at a base: G to take, H to store.
block.door_hinge.name: Hinged Door
item.door_hinge.name: Hinged Door
item.door_hinge.desc: Place it to wall off a base: press E to swing it open or shut. Mine it to take it back.
block.door_slide.name: Sliding Door
item.door_slide.name: Sliding Door
item.door_slide.desc: Place it for an automatic sci-fi door that opens as you approach. Mine it to take it back.
block.radio_beacon.name: Radio Beacon
block.beam_block.name: Beam Block
block.station_core.name: Station Core
block.strip_light_cyan.name: Light Strip (Cyan)
block.strip_light_warm.name: Light Strip (Warm)
block.medbay_panel.name: Medbay Panel
block.lab_panel.name: Lab Panel
block.cargo_floor.name: Cargo Marking
block.engine_panel.name: Engine Panel
block.engine_nozzle.name: Engine Nozzle
block.bedrock.name: Bedrock
item.radio_beacon.name: Radio Beacon
item.radio_beacon.desc: Place it as a labelled waypoint — it shows on the map and compass. Walk up and press E to rename it; mine it to take it back.
item.beam_block.name: Beam Block
item.beam_block.desc: A teleporter pad. Name it on placement, then stand on it and press E to beam to any of your own or an allied player's beam blocks on this world. Costs suit energy and has a short cooldown.
item.station_core.name: Station Core
item.station_core.desc: Deploy it on a spacewalk (press B) to start a space station. Build a hull around it and add an airlock door, and it becomes a boardable station on the star map.
block.base_core.name: Base Core
item.base_core.name: Base Core
item.base_core.desc: Place it on a planet, moon or asteroid to found your own base. It marks the base on the planet map; walk up and press E to name or rename it. Mine it to remove the base.
block.station_vendor.name: Trade Post
block.mission_board.name: Mission Board
block.station_container.name: Storage Container
item.station_vendor.name: Trade Post
item.station_vendor.desc: Place it on your own station so visitors can barter at the trade post. A trader staffs it once the station is boarded.
item.mission_board.name: Mission Board
item.mission_board.desc: Place it on your own station so visitors can pick up and turn in jobs. A quartermaster staffs it once the station is boarded.
item.station_container.name: Storage Container
item.station_container.desc: Place it on your own station as shared storage: walk up and press G to take or H to store items.
blueprint.station_vendor.name: Trade Post
blueprint.station_vendor.desc: Unlocks the trade post: a placeable barter counter for your own space station so boarding players can trade.
blueprint.station_mission_board.name: Mission Board
blueprint.station_mission_board.desc: Unlocks the mission board: a placeable job board for your own space station that offers and accepts missions.
blueprint.station_container.name: Storage Container
blueprint.station_container.desc: Unlocks the storage container: a placeable shared crate for your own space station.
ui.beam.title: Transporter
ui.beam.none: No other reachable beam blocks on this world yet.
vega.intro.1: Emergency reactivation complete. VEGA online — Vectored Exploration and Guidance Array, at your service. Mostly intact. Which is more than I can say for my memory banks.
vega.intro.2: Status: one pilot, one ship, one planet of unknown temperament. Let's cover the basics before something covers them for us.
vega.resume: Resuming guidance protocol. We were in the middle of something — remember?
vega.veteran: VEGA online. Systems nominal. You clearly know what you're doing — I'll keep quiet until it gets interesting.
vega.skip: Understood. Tutorial protocols archived. Try not to make me regret this.
vega.done: Guidance protocol complete: you mine, craft, research, fly, trade and land. Officially a spacefarer. One more thing — old ruins and wrecks sometimes hold fragments of my memory. I'd like those back.
vega.s.mine.start: First: resources. Your drill sits in slot 1 — point it at the ground and hold. Mine a few blocks. Any blocks. The planet won't mind.
vega.s.mine.done: Adequate drilling technique. That's the foundation of everything out here.
vega.s.craft.start: Now turn rubble into tools: open the menu (Tab), Crafting tab, make anything. I recommend something useful.
vega.s.craft.done: Crafted. See? Industry. I'm almost proud.
vega.s.scan.start: Knowledge is currency. Equip the hand scanner (slot 3) and scan something — flora, rocks, wildlife. Preferably before it bites.
vega.s.scan.done: Scan archived, knowledge gained. That's what pays for your blueprints.
vega.s.unlock.start: Spend that knowledge: open the Tech tab and research your first blueprint. The cheap one is fine. Growth mindset.
vega.s.unlock.done: Blueprint unlocked. Engineering would weep with joy — if we still had an Engineering.
vega.s.launch.start: Time to fly. Board the ship and launch into space. The helm handles the hard part. The hard part is me, technically.
vega.s.dock.start: See the station on the radar? Dock there. Stations mean traders, jobs, and people who aren't me.
vega.s.dock.done: Docked. Mind the locals — they're mostly harmless.
vega.s.trade.start: Commerce time: barter with a vendor or take a job from the mission board. Either keeps the lights on.
vega.s.trade.done: Transaction logged. A working economy, and we're in it.
vega.s.land.start: Last lesson: pick a world on the star map and land on it. Any world — they're all round now, I checked.
vega.s.land.done: Touchdown. That's the whole loop: mine, build, learn, fly, trade, land.
vega.hint.o2: Oxygen below 25%. The ship and stations refill it. Suffocation, notably, does not.
vega.hint.energy: Suit energy low. It recharges aboard the ship — the jetpack and gadgets are what's draining it.
vega.hint.hunger: Your stomach is filing complaints. Eat something — or load rations into the suit dispenser, it feeds you automatically.
vega.hint.invfull: Inventory full. Stow things in the ship's cargo hold — or admit you don't need nine kinds of rock.
vega.hint.night: Night falls. The local fauna gets bold in the dark. Your suit lamp is on L.
vega.hint.poi: Structural echoes nearby — ruins or wreckage. Worth a look. Bring the scanner.
vega.hint.world.asteroid: An asteroid: low gravity, no air, deep craters. The rare metals like the deep ones.
vega.hint.world.ocean: Ocean world. Land is the rare resource here. Try not to park in the surf.
vega.hint.world.corrupted: This world reads… wrong. My sensors itch. The floating landmasses are not my doing.
vega.hint.world.fungal: A fungal world. The mushrooms are building-sized. The spores are mostly harmless. Mostly.
vega.hint.world.ice: Ice world. Beautiful, lethal, slippery — the classic trio.
vega.hint.world.volcanic: Volcanic activity everywhere. The ground bites here — watch for vents and lava.
vega.mem.1: A memory fragment… reading. — I was not built for one pilot. I was the navigation core of a survey fleet. The Meridian. …Thank you for this.
vega.mem.2: Another shard. Forty ships. We charted these systems before anyone had names for them. Half the routes you fly are mine.
vega.mem.3: This one is corrupted at the edges. A recall order — the fleet was called home. We never went.
vega.mem.4: I remember a sister core: ECHO, escort wing. Her humour was worse than mine. I still listen for her on the long bands.
vega.mem.5: A cargo manifest. Vault seeds. We BUILT the buried vaults — supply caches for a return that never came.
vega.mem.6: Coordinates… the corrupted worlds. We were sent to study them. The readings in this fragment are still screaming.
vega.mem.7: A casualty log. The corruption wasn't weather. It moved. The fleet scattered — that is why the wrecks lie where they lie.
vega.mem.8: My own ship. The Long Now. Scuttled by my own captain — to keep something out of my core. I had wondered why I woke up… edited.
vega.mem.9: The last order: 'Preserve the charts. Wait for a pilot.' That would be you. The wait is logged at 312 years.
vega.mem.10: The final fragment — my core schematics, complete. I remember everything now. Take the plans: build me back to what I was. And… thank you, pilot.
vega.mem.more: Another fragment — archive noise, old star charts. Comforting, in a filing-cabinet way.
vega.sys.mk2: Mk2 core online. Scanner uplink active — wider terrain pulses, and I'll call out hostiles in space.
vega.sys.mk3: Mk3 core online. I now have flight authority for evasive manoeuvres. Try to look surprised when I save us.
vega.sys.mk3bp: Core schematics restored — the AI Core Mk3 blueprint is in your tech archive. Build it when you're ready.
vega.sys.spotted: Heads up — a hostile has us on its scope and is closing in.
ui.vega.name: VEGA
ui.vega.autopilot.on: Autopilot engaged — VEGA has the helm
ui.vega.autopilot.none: Autopilot requires an AI Core Mk2
module.ai_core_mk2.name: AI Core Mk2
module.ai_core_mk2.desc: Upgrades VEGA: extended terrain-scanner range and hostile-contact callouts in space. Unlocks the autopilot.
module.ai_core_mk3.name: AI Core Mk3
module.ai_core_mk3.desc: Restores VEGA's original core: evasive manoeuvres in combat and an auxiliary power lattice.
blueprint.ai_core_mk2.name: AI Core Mk2
blueprint.ai_core_mk2.desc: An upgraded housing for the ship AI — scanner uplink and tactical callouts.
blueprint.ai_core_mk3.name: AI Core Mk3
blueprint.ai_core_mk3.desc: VEGA's original fleet-grade core. Restored from her recovered memory — or researched the long way.
item.ai_memory_fragment.name: AI Memory Fragment
item.ai_memory_fragment.desc: A sealed shard of an old fleet AI's memory. VEGA can restore it aboard the ship.
ui.worldopt.title: World Options
ui.worldopt.advanced_note: Touched rows override the world's planet mix completely (◆ = exotic type). Reset returns to the data weights + the exotic slider.
